title: PostgreSQL Work Claims, SKIP LOCKED, Leases, and Fencing · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go feed-service run contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, normalization, fetch, SQL, transaction, lease, goroutine, handler, accessibility, migration, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in multi-instance fenced fetch-claim protocol and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Claim a bounded due batch with ordered FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED work in a short transaction and release locks before network I/O.
Issue attempt and fencing tokens with owner, expiry, heartbeat budget, and state so stale workers cannot commit.
Finalize success or failure only when source, attempt, token, and current lease match in one affected-row check.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Go Short Claim Transaction
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 4095 during an isolated backup restore exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove short SKIP LOCKED claims, fenced leases, conditional finalize, and fault recovery; browser Go must remain deterministic and free of network, database, process, and host effects; then change one schema, constraint, transaction, upsert, migration, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Claim a bounded due batch with ordered FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED work in a short transaction and release locks before network I/O.

Inspect the Feed Go Short Claim Transaction trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
